description: Factor Risk Model - Barra-style decomposition of the firm book into 6 ETF-proxy factors (market/size/value/momentum/quality/low-vol): systematic vs idio risk, VaR/ES, scenario stress, hedges. Output data/factor-risk.json.

eventbridge_scheduler.description: Factor risk model - daily 02:30 UTC, after firm-book / risk-monitor / liquidity-capacity
